response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the video as a segment from Hakui Koyori's birthday live concert.
2. Song 1: Title "My Soul, Your Beats!" found on-screen. Original artist identified as Lia (from Angel Beats!). Performed by Hakui Koyori, Hoshimachi Suisei, and Shirakami Fubuki. Search query: `"My Soul, Your Beats!" Angel Beats! Japanese and English lyrics`.
3. Song 2: Title "管制塔より" found on-screen. Original artist/performer identified as Hakui Koyori. Search query: `"管制塔より" 博衣こより Japanese and English lyrics`.
4. Extracted lyrics for both songs based on the search results and verified content.
response.global_summary: The video is a segment from Hakui Koyori's birthday concert featuring two vocal performances: a cover of "My Soul, Your Beats!" followed by her original song "管制塔より" (Kanseitou yori), with an instrumental transition between them.

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori, Hoshimachi Suisei, and Shirakami Fubuki perform "My Soul, Your Beats!".
scenes.performer_in_video: Hakui Koyori, Hoshimachi Suisei, Shirakami Fubuki
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
目覚めては繰り返す 眠い朝は
襟のタイをきつく締め
教室のドアくぐると 本の少し
胸を張って歩き出せる
そんな日常に吹く
あぁ...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Waking up and repeating, on sleepy mornings
I tighten the tie around my collar
When I pass through the classroom door, I can walk in with my chest puffed out proudly
Such a wind blows past everyday life
Just a little bit...

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori performs her original song "管制塔より".
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぽつり灯り 管制塔
砂嵐の向こうへ
祈るよう 綴った
これからのこと
...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A faint light, control tower
Towards the other side of the sandstorm
Praying, I wrote down
Things about the future
...
